title: Vietnamese Grilled Pork Chops
description: Marinated pork chops grilled to perfection with a sweet and spicy flavor profile.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together xtra, pungent, and a pinch of salt.
Add the pork chops and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove pork chops from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill pork chops for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F.
Let pork chops rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with sliced onion and additional xtra, if desired.
